since_last: 62% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.27%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.51% · BTC -3.15% · Gold +0.69% · Nasdaq100 +1.14%. 62% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.27%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.27%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +18.98%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +18.98%, AVAV +15.27%, VRT +7.47%, MRVL +6.98%, CEVA +6.65%. Laggards: DLR -5.13%, TTD -4.64%, SMR -4.32%, HON -3.46%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.83% at $172.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
